channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: This Exit from J11A of the M5 lends itself to having Arrow road markings depicting the inside lane with a left hand arrow and the outside lane showing a Straight on arrow., 19th March
item.description:
The exit onto the roundabout from the J11A sliproad off the M5 in Gloucester (the hucclecote/brockworth bypass).
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brockworth Interchange, Brockworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Road marking white lines or studs

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 19th March
item.description:
Fw vegetation Needs cutting and clearing 7mtrs length Fw closure (Overgrown Hedge)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpermitted roadworks problem, 19th March
item.description:
Email received 18/03/2026 - copy attached. Customer asks: Hello, Residents have advised that Stockwell Lane is closed this week, and the collection crew would like guidance on how best to access the bins for collection during the closure. https://www.facebook.com/share/p/17b4ywuiKN/?mibextid=wwXIfr Could you please confirm the most suitable access route or any temporary arrangements the crew should follow? Thank you,
Report on FixMyStreet
